title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Amazing! You did it! That was out of sight!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
No worries! If I run out of space in my room, I can
always use them to decorate Tata!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
They're presents from you, so I'll take good care
of all of them!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
They're presents from you, so I'll take good care
of all of them!
